articles.title: Quincy argues in front of SJC to install 10-foot patron saint statues at public safety building
articles.description:
“In this country, public art doesn’t become off-limits just because it may make some people think about religion."

The post Quincy argues in front of SJC to install 10-foot patron saint statues at public safety building appeared first on Boston.com.
